panels.title: Your story as a living system
panels.description: Explore capabilities as interconnected cells instead of a static linear deck.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 14% 20%, rgba(82, 244, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(82, 244, 255, 0.09) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 84% 18%, rgba(170, 95, 255, 0.46) 0%, rgba(170, 95, 255, 0.11) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(142deg, #060a16 0%, #142655 50%, #1f124a 100%)

panels.title: Editor UX
panels.description: Compose rich slide narratives with zero-code controls.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 80% 16%, rgba(255, 104, 187, 0.42) 0%, rgba(255, 104, 187, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 20% 82%, rgba(82, 124, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(82, 124, 255, 0.09) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(150deg, #0a0815 0%, #2a124a 50%, #182b53 100%)

panels.title: Runtime motion
panels.description: GSAP transitions preserve flow and avoid dead states.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 78% 24%, rgba(255, 182, 77, 0.44) 0%, rgba(255, 182, 77, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 18% 78%, rgba(112, 231, 255, 0.36) 0%, rgba(112, 231, 255, 0.08) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(130deg, #060a12 0%, #1d2f48 48%, #3a1a59 100%)

panels.title: Embed pipeline
panels.description: Ship once and distribute through Framer, Webflow or docs.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 76% 76%, rgba(203, 92, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(203, 92, 255, 0.09) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 22% 20%, rgba(0, 220, 255, 0.4) 0%, rgba(0, 220, 255, 0.08) 38%, transparent 66%), linear-gradient(146deg, #070914 0%, #20295c 52%, #19133f 100%)

panels.title: Data control
panels.description: Keep ownership of stories while iterating fast.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 18%, rgba(65, 255, 204, 0.38) 0%, rgba(65, 255, 204, 0.08) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 84% 82%, rgba(148, 96, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(148, 96, 255, 0.1) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(134deg, #050a11 0%, #113043 48%, #281551 100%)

panels.title: Collaboration
panels.description: Teams align messaging, design and growth in one map.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 24% 14%, rgba(255, 115, 115, 0.4) 0%, rgba(255, 115, 115, 0.09) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 80%, rgba(113, 148, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(113, 148, 255, 0.1) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(152deg, #090812 0%, #2a1e4e 50%, #17284f 100%)

panels.title: Activate your growth loop
panels.description: Turn every published story into a reusable conversion asset.
panels.backgroundGradient: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 14%, rgba(115, 148, 255, 0.45) 0%, rgba(115, 148, 255, 0.1) 34%, transparent 62%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 84%, rgba(209, 74, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(209, 74, 255, 0.09) 36%, transparent 64%), linear-gradient(180deg, #050914 0%, #13254b 46%, #2d1453 100%)
